personas.name: Anxious Student Seeking Emotional Support
personas.description: A university student who experiences frequent anxiety and stress due to academic pressure and personal challenges. They use Wysa as a private and judgment-free space to manage their emotions and calm themselves during stressful moments.
pain_points: App responses sometimes feel repetitive or unhelpful
context: Using the app during moments of stress or panic
Accessing the app late at night or between classes
constraints: Requires a private and safe space for emotional expression

personas.name: Sleep-Deprived User Seeking Relaxation
personas.description: A user who struggles with falling asleep and uses Wysa to relax their mind before bedtime. They rely on calming exercises, sleep stories, and guided techniques to improve sleep quality.
context: Using the app at night before sleeping
Listening to calming exercises in bed

personas.name: Reflective User Practicing Self-Improvement
personas.description: A user interested in journaling, CBT exercises, and self-reflection. They use Wysa to better understand their thoughts and emotions and to track personal growth over time.
context: Using the app during quiet personal time

personas.name: Price-Sensitive User Frustrated by Paywalls
personas.description: A user who finds value in the app but is frustrated by premium features being locked behind a subscription. They want affordable access to mental health support without excessive restrictions.
goals: Access useful features without paying high costs
Get value from the free version
Decide whether the premium version is worth it
pain_points: Too many features locked behind paywall
context: Exploring the app before committing to subscription
constraints: Needs clear value justification for paid features

personas.name: Frustrated User Facing Technical Issues
personas.description: A user who encounters bugs, crashes, or login issues while using Wysa. These technical problems reduce trust in the app and prevent consistent usage.
goals: Use the app without crashes or errors
Have a smooth and stable experience
context: Using the app during important moments
